title: UX-clarification hyper-sprint

change_requests.summary: Section title-card slides render in gallery/overview as presented — distinct styling, non-draggable, excluded from all slide counts incl. thumbnail page-badge total.

Edit-mode TOC as ARIA tree: Right expand / Left collapse on focused section header; canvas Left/Right still advance slides; collapsed section holding current slide shows live k/N marker + accent border; collapse survives undo/redo.

Robust desktop save (retry/verify, keep-unsaved-on-failure, content-hash watcher echo-guard, reconnect probe) + save-status pill (Saved/Saving/Couldn't save-Retry/Reconnecting) + one-shot failure toast. Windows-only triggers documented for manual confirm.
Count-driven balanced grid: 1 solo, 2 side-by-side, 3 thirds, 4 = 2x2, 5 = 3+2 centered; balances with text; caps at 5, 6th spills to new slide; grids stay on-canvas and letterbox tall images.
One aiWork flag animates every AI op (incl. chat/Vera edits, which animated nothing before) with vera-thinking scan + magic-reveal settle, accent-tinted, reduced-motion honored.

process_improvement: Ambiguous CRs (2,4,5) got a mixed PO/PM/UX discovery agent (explore live app + code, propose final UX per modern practice); CR3 got a source-level root-cause investigation. UX specs written before implementation.
delivery: 4 parallel worktree workers (CR1+CR2, CR4, CR5, CR3) -> integrator merge (also brought branch up to date with main's security work) -> changelog dedup.
